changeSet.id: 20190613 add updated_at to subject and topic and resource
changeSet.author: Jon-Eirik Pettersen
Jon-Eirik Pettersen
changeSet.createView:
SELECT subject.id AS entity_id, 'subject' AS entity_type, subject.updated_at AS updated_at, updated_entity.id AS updated_entity_id, updated_entity.url_map_updated_at AS url_map_updated_at FROM subject LEFT JOIN updated_entity ON updated_entity.entity_id = subject.id AND updated_entity.entity_type = 'subject'
UNION SELECT topic.id AS entity_id, 'topic' AS entity_type, topic.updated_at AS updated_at, updated_entity.id AS updated_entity_id, updated_entity.url_map_updated_at AS url_map_updated_at FROM topic LEFT JOIN updated_entity ON updated_entity.entity_id = topic.id AND updated_entity.entity_type = 'topic'
UNION SELECT resource.id AS entity_id, 'resource' AS entity_type, resource.updated_at AS updated_at, updated_entity.id AS updated_entity_id, updated_entity.url_map_updated_at AS url_map_updated_at FROM resource LEFT JOIN updated_entity ON updated_entity.entity_id = resource.id AND updated_entity.entity_type = 'resource'

changeSet.id: 20190614 add update column to updateable_entity view
changeSet.author: Jon-Eirik Pettersen
changeSet.createView:
SELECT subject.id AS entity_id, 'subject' AS entity_type, subject.updated_at AS updated_at, updated_entity.id AS updated_entity_id, updated_entity.url_map_updated_at AS url_map_updated_at, updated_entity.update AS update FROM subject LEFT JOIN updated_entity ON updated_entity.entity_id = subject.id AND updated_entity.entity_type = 'subject'
UNION SELECT topic.id AS entity_id, 'topic' AS entity_type, topic.updated_at AS updated_at, updated_entity.id AS updated_entity_id, updated_entity.url_map_updated_at AS url_map_updated_at, updated_entity.update AS update FROM topic LEFT JOIN updated_entity ON updated_entity.entity_id = topic.id AND updated_entity.entity_type = 'topic'
UNION SELECT resource.id AS entity_id, 'resource' AS entity_type, resource.updated_at AS updated_at, updated_entity.id AS updated_entity_id, updated_entity.url_map_updated_at AS url_map_updated_at, updated_entity.update AS update FROM resource LEFT JOIN updated_entity ON updated_entity.entity_id = resource.id AND updated_entity.entity_type = 'resource'

changeSet.id: 20190618 remove update triggers and cached_url view
changeSet.author: Jon-Eirik Pettersen
changeSet.sql: drop function if exists update_url_cache() cascade;
DROP MATERIALIZED VIEW IF EXISTS cached_url;

rollback.sql:
CREATE MATERIALIZED VIEW cached_url as ( WITH RECURSIVE tree (id, public_id, name, parent_public_id, level, is_primary, path) AS ( SELECT contexts.id, contexts.public_id, contexts.name, cast(NULL AS VARCHAR) AS parent_public_id, 0 AS level, TRUE AS is_primary, '/' || substr(contexts.public_id, 5) AS path FROM ( SELECT id, public_id, name FROM subject
UNION ALL
SELECT id, public_id, name FROM topic WHERE context = TRUE ) contexts
UNION ALL
SELECT child.id, child.public_id, child.name, parent.public_id AS parent_public_id, parent.level + 1 AS level, child.is_primary AND parent.is_primary AS is_primary, parent.path || '/' || substr(child.public_id, 5) FROM ( SELECT r.id, r.public_id, t.public_id AS parent_public_id, r.name, tr.is_primary AS is_primary FROM resource r INNER JOIN topic_resource tr ON tr.resource_id = r.id INNER JOIN topic t ON tr.topic_id = t.id
UNION ALL
SELECT st.id, st.public_id, t.public_id AS parent_public_id, st.name, tst.is_primary AS is_primary FROM topic t INNER JOIN topic_subtopic tst ON t.id = tst.topic_id INNER JOIN topic st ON tst.subtopic_id = st.id
UNION ALL
SELECT t.id, t.public_id, s.public_id AS parent_public_id, t.name, st.is_primary AS is_primary FROM subject s INNER JOIN subject_topic st ON s.id = st.subject_id INNER JOIN topic t ON st.topic_id = t.id ) child INNER JOIN tree AS parent ON parent.public_id = child.parent_public_id WHERE 1 = 1 )
SELECT id, public_id, path, is_primary, parent_public_id FROM tree t );
drop function if exists update_url_cache() cascade;
